subject: [PATCH 06/14] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking could be silently dropped, leading to unexpected behavior when accessing pages with PAGE_NONE semantics. The patch updates several functions to correctly handle the uffd bit and VM_UFFD_RWP flag in these scenarios.
